summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GlowWithLucy candle business website. All core functionality working correctly including navigation, contact form submission, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (/api/, /api/status, /api/contact) - all returning 200 status
Contact form submission and data persistence
Homepage loads with hero section and featured candles (7oz, 9oz, 12oz)
Navigation between all pages (Home, Shop, About, Contact)
Shop page displays all candle sizes with enquire buttons
About page loads with story and values sections
Contact page form with all required fields (Name, Email, Candle Size dropdown, Scent Preference, Message)
Contact form integration - successful submission and success message display
Footer displays 'Built by DH Website Services'
Email lucyd789@sky.com displayed correctly on contact and shop pages

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components and interactions working
success_percentage.integration: 100% - Contact form backend integration working perfectly
